DP.518.0000:
I’m using Seals to learn the
alphabet!
DP.518.0001:
Oh, that [0100,0000] looks just like
my Seals!\f
I’ll give you a bunch of Seals that
look like it.\f
DP.518.0002:
I wonder which came first, that
Pokémon or the alphabet?\r
I think it’s kind of neat.
DP.518.0003:
I wanted to give you some Seals,
but you don’t have a Seal Case!\r
You should talk to my mom!
DP.518.0004:
The [010A,0000] were
put away in the Seal Case.
DP.518.0005:
You can customize Poké Balls by
affixing Seals on them.\f
Oh, you don’t have a Seal Case?
Well, here you go!\f
DP.518.0006:
First, check the heading “Ball
Capsules” in your PC menu.\f
Next, choose a Capsule and apply
Seals to it as you wish.\f
When you’re done, put the Capsule
on a Poké Ball.
DP.518.0007:
My son goes out to the ruins
whenever he gets the chance.\f
He says that it’s good for making
Seals for his Ball Capsules.\f
If you don’t mind, can you show him
the Pokémon you catch in the ruins?
